title: Add hardcoded domain allowlist for web_fetch sandbox bypass (parity with CC preapproved.ts)
description:
Gap: CC tools/WebFetchTool/preapproved.ts defines ~130 code-documentation domains (docs.python.org, react.dev, doc.rust-lang.org, etc.) that bypass the user-permission prompt for web_fetch (GET-only). Preapproved hosts skip checkPermissions and go directly to fetch.

CC source: preapproved.ts:14-131 (PREAPPROVED_HOSTS Set), preapproved.ts:154-166 (isPreapprovedHost with path-scoped entries using segment-boundary matching), WebFetchTool.ts:108-121 (checkPermissions returns behavior:'allow' immediately).

OC counterpart: None. Every web_fetch requires user-granted permission or explicit allow-rule.

Security note: preapproval is GET-only and deliberately NOT shared with sandbox network restrictions (per preapproved.ts:1-12 comment). Domains like huggingface.co allow file uploads and would be dangerous for unrestricted network access.

Done when: OC has a static list matching CC's set; isPreapprovedHost handles bare-hostname and path-scoped entries with segment-boundary enforcement; web_fetch skips permission prompt for preapproved URLs; list is NOT applied to network egress restrictions.

Parent spec: #529
